---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
---

I am pursuing a Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at the University of California, Irvine's Paul Merage School of Business. My academic pursuits focus on predictive modeling, data visualization, decision analytics, and optimization. 

### Academic Background

- **MS in Business Analytics**, UC Irvine (Paul Merage School of Business) – coursework in machine learning, statistics, and data strategy
- **Bachelor’s degree** in [Your Undergraduate Major], [Your University] – built a foundation in quantitative methods and business principles

I’m passionate about translating data into actionable insights and am always eager to collaborate on analytics-driven projects.

Change #2
